data.title: FedEx names Scott Ray as U.S. and Canada Surface COO, effective June 1. He starts as COO-elect on Feb. 1. FedEx Freight's new CEO is John Smith.
data.description: FedEx Corp. has appointed Scott Ray as the new Chief Operating Officer for U.S. and Canada Surface Operations, effective June 1. He will start transitioning into the role on Feb. 1 as COO-elect. Ray, who will report to FedEx President and CEO Raj Subramaniam, will join the FedEx Executive Committee, taking over from John Smith as he moves to become the CEO of FedEx Freight starting June 1. Ray's responsibilities will include overseeing all operations in the U.S. and Canada.

data.title: Harvey AI debuts Academy, offering free courses to train legal pros on AI tools. Certification available. #LegalTech #AI.
data.description: Harvey, a legal AI startup, has launched Harvey Academy, providing certification courses and training free of charge. The platform aims to assist lawyers in implementing AI workflows.

data.title: Navidence, a health data tech company, secures seed funding from Nina Capital and Grand Ventures to enhance clinical research.
data.description: In Aurora, Colorado on January 27, 2026, Navidence, a tech firm specializing in health data analysis and aiding researchers in study planning, revealed the conclusion of its Series Seed preferred funding cycle. The funding round was co-led by Grand Ventures from Grand Rapids, Michigan and Nina.

data.title: WITHit releases a new black titanium Apple Watch band, touted as their most durable yet, offering a quiet luxury look with a universal fit. #tech #wearables #AppleWatch
data.description: Introducing the newest Apple Watch band from WITHit, renowned for its exceptional durability. This latest release boasts a sleek and sophisticated design, appealing to users seeking a touch of luxury. Known for their innovative wearable tech accessories, WITHit has launched this universal fit band in the new year. This band is equipped to cater to all users regardless of their wrist size. The new Black Apple Watch band is making waves in the market, promising to be the brand's most robust offering yet. This upgrade showcases WITHit's commitment to blending style with functionality to enhance user experience in 2026.

data.title: Centage introduces AI-powered integration framework, reducing FP&A implementation time from weeks to days. ERP systems connected in 48-72 hours instead of 8-12 weeks.
data.description: A company focused on financial planning and analysis in San Antonio has implemented artificial intelligence technology to address the challenge of integrating enterprise software. This innovation has significantly reduced the time required to connect ERP systems from 8-12 weeks to just 48-72 hours. The company, Centage, based in San Antonio, made this announcement on January 27, 2026, demonstrating a faster and more efficient approach to ERP system integration.

data.title: CEO Coaching International partners with Addicus to assist entrepreneurial families in wealth management.
data.description: Miami, January 27, 2026 - CEO Coaching International, a top CEO coaching firm catering to growth-focused CEOs and entrepreneurs worldwide, has announced Addicus as its latest Diamond Strategic Partner. This collaboration combines two organizations dedicated to strategic growth and development.

data.title: Animoca, RootstockLabs to introduce Bitcoin DeFi to Japanese institutions, focusing on treasury management for companies.
data.description: The collaboration aims to assist Japanese companies in managing their Bitcoin treasury by utilizing Rootstock-based solutions such as rBTC and RIF.

data.title: Breathe Easy Baby calls for updated standards as sleep-related infant deaths continue despite safe-sleep advice.
data.description: A company known for its innovative breathable crib mattresses, Breathe Easy Baby™, is calling for revisions to infant sleep safety guidelines in light of ongoing concerns over sleep-related fatalities. The plea comes amidst reports indicating that such deaths continue to be a pressing issue nationwide. The company, based in Ecorse, Michigan, issued this call on January 27, 2026. Despite widespread efforts and educational initiatives promoting safe sleep practices over the years, the number of incidents remains troubling.

data.title: Frank Schuler appointed to GRLDC board to help expand housing supply and affordability efforts in Georgia.
data.description: Frank Schuler has been elected to the Board of the Georgia Residential Land Development Council (GRLDC) in an effort to expand the housing supply in Georgia and make it more affordable for residents. The appointment was made on January 27, 2026. This move comes as developers in the region aim to address the housing crisis by increasing the availability of homes. Schuler's role on the board will play a key part in driving these efforts forward.

data.title: OPENLANE (NYSE: OPLN) to announce Q4 and full year 2025 earnings on Feb. 18, 2026. Financial results will be released before the market opens.
data.description: On January 27, 2026, OPENLANE, Inc., a prominent digital marketplace operator for wholesale used vehicles, announced that they will disclose their financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 prior to the market opening on February 18, 2026. The company, traded on the NYSE under the symbol OPLN, will provide detailed information about their earnings and achievements during the said period.

data.title: Anixa Biosciences granted first Mexican patent for breast cancer vaccine technology, expanding global IP coverage.
data.description: Recently, a Notice of Allowance was granted for the first Mexican patent on the Anixa Breast Cancer Vaccine. This development signifies an expansion in global intellectual property protection, particularly in regions with a higher prevalence of late-stage breast cancer cases and increased rates of triple-negative breast cancer. The issuance of the patent occurred in San Jose, California on January 27, 2026.

data.description: In Middletown, Delaware, on January 27, 2026, Anura discovered and effectively combatted a novel type of Sophisticated Invalid Traffic (SIVT) utilizing artificial intelligence to target weaknesses in JavaScript-centered fraud prevention systems. data.title: UnitedHealth stock declines after Medicare rates announcement. Q4 2025 earnings: $2.11 (down from $6.81) on $113.215B revenue (12% YOY increase).
data.description: UnitedHealth Group's stock is facing pressure following the US Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services announcement of unchanged rates for Medicare insurers in the coming year. Despite this, the insurance giant reported its fourth-quarter 2025 earnings and fiscal 2026 guidance. The company disclosed adjusted earnings of $2.11, which was a decrease from $6.81 in the previous year, surpassing the consensus estimate of $2.10. Revenues saw a 12% year-over-year increase, reaching $113.215 billion, slightly below the expected $113.817 billion. The medical care ratio for fiscal 2025 was 89.1%, with an adjusted ratio of 88.9% after factoring in a negative impact from loss contracts, marking a 340 basis point rise from the previous year. The fourth quarter's MCR was at 92.4%. The operating cost ratio for the year stood at 13.3%, while the adjusted ratio... Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Silver volume on Hyperliquid hits $1.15B in 24 hours, surpassing Solana and XRP. SILVER-USDC contract posts $994M volume. Silver emerges as strong commodity on crypto exchange.
data.description: Silver perpetual contracts on the Hyperliquid platform recorded a significant milestone on Monday, with a 24-hour trading volume reaching $1.15 billion. This figure surpassed the trading volumes of popular cryptocurrencies like Solana and XRP, indicating a shift in trader behavior towards betting on commodities instead of digital assets. Notably, the SILVER-USDC contract emerged as one of the most active markets on Hyperliquid, with a 24-hour volume of approximately $994 million. The open interest for this contract amounts to around $154.5 million, while the funding remains slightly negative, suggesting high turnover and diverse trading positions rather than a leveraged directional bet. This market behavior indicates a focus on volatility and hedging strategies rather than speculative long positions. The prominence of silver in this context is highlighted by the fact that the commodity contract now ranks closely behind Bitcoin and Ethereum in terms of trading volume. For further details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: ParaZero signs new reseller agreement in Europe with initial order for DefendAir; targeting NATO markets.
data.description: On January 27, 2026, in Kfar Saba, Israel, aerospace defense company ParaZero Technologies Ltd. (Nasdaq: PRZO) revealed a recent reseller agreement with a leading Western European partner. The deal incorporates an initial procurement of DefendAir training kits, showcasing ParaZero's advancements in providing intelligent autonomous solutions for both manned and unmanned aerial systems (UAS) globally. This agreement signifies a significant move for ParaZero's growth strategy in Europe, focusing on key NATO-aligned defense sectors.

data.title: Mama's Creations, Inc. (NASDAQ: MAMA) invited to 3 investor conferences in Winter 2026 to showcase products and opportunities.
data.description: East Rutherford, New Jersey, January 27, 2026 - Mama’s Creations, Inc. (NASDAQ: MAMA), a prominent national supplier of fresh Deli prepared foods, shared news of their participation in three significant investor conferences during Winter 2026. The company's management has secured spots in the Oppenheimer 11th Annual Emerging Growth Conference, the 2nd Annual DA Davidson CEO Forum, and the 38th Annual Roth Conference. These events offer valuable networking opportunities and the chance to showcase Mama’s Creations to potential investors.

EU–INDIA TRADE MEGA-DEAL India and the EU have agreed to a massive free-trade pact covering nearly two billion consumers, opening India to European cars and goods while reducing tariffs across most trade. It’s the EU’s largest deal by population and reflects countries
